title: Smoky Tangy Kenyar Sweet Potatoes Stir-fry
description: A festive vegan dish featuring tender sweet potatoes seasoned with smokiness and tanginess for a delightful fusion of flavors.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons soy sauce or tamari liquid
ingredients.notes: use for both smokiness and tangy flavor

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley or cilantro (for garnish)

instructions: Slice the sweet potatoes into even-sized pieces and place them on a baking sheet. Drizzle with lemon juice, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
If using vegan butter/margarine, add it now for added richness and stir until coated evenly.
Roast in preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes or until the sweet potatoes are tender.
While the potatoes are roasting, prepare a quick sauce by whisking soy sauce or tamari with fresh lemon juice. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Once the sweet potatoes are done, remove from heat and let cool slightly before stirring in the prepared sauce.
Return to oven for an additional 3-5 minutes to allow flavors to meld together. Remove from oven and sprinkle parsley or cilantro over top as garnish.
Serve hot with your choice of grains like quinoa or brown rice for a complete meal.
